title: WeBuild – IBAN Ownership Verification (IBAN-OV) – SD-JWT VC payload
description: Schema for the SD-JWT VC payload of an IBAN-OV attestation as defined in the IBAN-OV Rulebook (Chapter 3.2). This models the JSON claims set prior to SD-JWT disclosure/packing.

vct.description: Verifiable Credential Type. Base type is 'eu.we-build.iban-ov.1'.

iss.description: Issuer of the attestation. Identifies the financial institution (ASPSP) that issued the IBAN-OV attestation. Follows RFC 7519.

iat.description: Issuance date as a Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch). Represents the date and time when the attestation was issued (ISO 8601 / RFC 7519). SHALL NOT be selectively disclosable.

exp.description: Expiry date as a Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch). Represents the date and time when the attestation expires (ISO 8601 / RFC 7519). SHALL be later than 'iat'. SHALL NOT be selectively disclosable.

issuing_entity.description: The identifier of the legal entity that issued the attestation. Typically the issuing financial institution (ASPSP) for EAA attestations. SHALL NOT be selectively disclosable.

attestation_legal_category.description: The legal category of the attestation as defined by eIDAS 2. For the IBAN-OV attestation issued by the bank (ASPSP) acting as an authorized issuer, this is 'EAA'.

schema_version.description: Version of the IBAN-OV attestation schema used.

bank_account.description: Core details of the bank account itself (the 'what'). SHALL be individually selectively disclosable as a top-level claim.

account_name.description: Name of the account, generated by the bank or customized by the owner.

iban.description: International Bank Account Number, as defined in ISO 13616:2020. SHALL conform to the format [A-Z]{2}[0-9A-Z]{13,30}.

account_type.description: Nature of the bank account. SHOULD use one of the standardized values defined in Section 2.8.2 (e.g. CURRENT, SAVINGS, BASIC, LOAN, OTHER).

account_currency.description: Currency code(s) used for the account, as defined in ISO 4217:2015. SHALL contain at least one valid ISO 4217:2015 currency code.

account_ownership.description: Identifies the legal owner of the account (the 'who'), including name and EUID. SHALL be individually selectively disclosable as a top-level claim.

owner_name.description: Legal name of the legal person, or natural person in case of a sole trader, owning the account.

euid.description: The EUID as unique identifier of the legal person owning the account. SHALL be a non-empty string identifying the legal entity owning the account.

account_provider.description: Describes the financial institution that issued the account and related metadata (the 'where & how'). SHALL be individually selectively disclosable as a top-level claim.

provider_name.description: Name of the financial institution providing the account.

euid.description: EUID as unique identification number of the issuing financial institution. SHALL be a non-empty string identifying the issuing financial institution.

provider_country.description: Alpha-3 country code, as defined in ISO 3166-1, of the provider country or territory. SHALL be a valid ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code.

bic_swift.description: International code (BIC or SWIFT code), as defined in ISO 9362, of the financial institution. SHALL conform to the ISO 9362:2022 format [A-Z]{6}[A-Z0-9]{2}([A-Z0-9]{3})?.

national_bank_code.description: Country-specific code for internal routing within a specific country's clearing system. Optional attribute.

nace_code.description: NACE code for activity specification (e.g. 64.19). Optional attribute.

clearing_number.description: Clearing number for identification of the financial institution, used only in some countries. Optional attribute.

status.description: Status object per SD-JWT VC status-list mechanism. MUST be present when the technical validity period is greater than 24 hours.

type.description: Status mechanism type. For SD-JWT VC Status List this SHALL be 'status-list'.

status_list_credential.description: URI of the Status List Credential that contains the bitstring indicating revocation status.

status_list_index.description: Zero-based index into the status list bitstring for this credential.

status_purpose.description: Purpose of the status entry. For the IBAN-OV attestation this SHALL be 'revocation'.

trust_anchor_url.description: URL at which a machine-readable version of the trust anchor used for verifying the IBAN-OV attestation can be found or looked up.

cnf.description: Confirmation claims per SD-JWT VC. Holder binding via JWK is recommended. The IBAN-OV attestation SHALL be cryptographically bound to the specific Holder wallet onboarded by the issuer.

jwk.description: Public key bound to the holder.
